sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10574" key="a)nti/taktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντί-τακτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n10574.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contrary, opposed,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τῶν πραγμάτων ἐχόντων τι-ον</foreign> Hierocl.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.60A.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
